description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian dressed in a modern, urban style. He wears a fitted black jacket over a red shirt, with tactical-style pants featuring knee pads and multiple straps. His face is partially obscured by a high-tech, black and red face mask, and he is bald with no visible hair. The outfit is completed with white athletic sneakers, and the overall appearance suggests a blend of streetwear and functional, protective gear. The figure stands upright with arms relaxed at his sides, exuding a confident and alert demeanor.
description: A bald adult male in urban tactical clothing, wearing a black jacket, red shirt, face mask, and white sneakers. The look combines streetwear with protective elements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face mask, red shirt, black jacket, and detailed pants with knee pads and straps.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face mask, jacket fit, and layered pants with visible straps.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the jacket, pants, and the bald head, with straps and knee pads visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the mask's side profile and the tactical details of the pants.
attribute_clothing_type: urban tactical jacket, fitted shirt, reinforced pants with knee pads and straps, athletic sneakers, high-tech face mask
